## What & why

## Type
- [ ] New scale driver
- [ ] Scale verification (marks a driver as tested)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Localization
- [ ] Other

## Scale driver checklist (if applicable)
- [ ] Registered in `ScaleDriverRegistry.all`
- [ ] `isTested` reflects reality (only `true` if confirmed on real hardware)
- [ ] Verified on hardware — model: `____`, real weight matched: yes/no

## Confirmations
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under GPL‑3.0‑or‑later
- [ ] I did not present estimated health values as medical facts
